title: Expanding Foam - Polyurethane Insulation Foam Filler for Walls, Doors, Roofs, Ceilings & More + Special Applicator (Thermal & Acoustic Insulation) 850ML
features: THERMAL & ACOUSTIC INSULATION - Expanding foam provides effective heat and sound insulation, reducing energy loss and improving comfort in walls, ceilings, roofs and floors
MULTI-PURPOSE APPLICATION - Ideal for filling gaps, cracks, cavities and joints around doors, windows, pipes, frames, and roofing structures
SPECIAL ADAPTER NOZZLE - Insulation foam is equipped with a adapter nozzle that fits perfectly to standart guns, ensuring clean and controlled usage on both small and large areas
ALL WEATHER DURABILITY - Resistant to moisture, steam and temperature fluctuations, ensuring long-lasting performance indoors and outdoors

HIGH COVERAGE & EFFICIENCY - Bonds securely to most building materials including concrete, wood, stone, brick, plaster and metal. When applied in a 2 cm layer, one 850 ml can provides insulation for up to 2 m2
description: Product Description SPECIAL ADAPTER NOZZLE FOR YOUR FOAM GUN Insulation foam is equipped with an adapter nozzle that fits perfectly to standard guns, ensuring clean and controlled usage on both small and large areas, while also providing a steady, uninterrupted flow for more precise application in hard-to-reach gaps and cavities. MULTI-PURPOSE Somafix professional-grade expanding foam can be used in walls, ceilings, lofts, attics, floors, doors, windows, frames, pipes, ducts, garages, sheds, workshops, greenhouses, studios, containers, campers, caravans and even boats PERFECT FOR WALLS & CELINGS Polyurethane insulation filler is the perfect solution for walls and ceilings, sealing cracks, gaps and cavities in plasterboard, drywall, lofts and attics to provide long-lasting thermal insulation and acoustic soundproofing EXCELLENT ADHESION With strong adhesion to concrete, brick, timber and plaster, Somafix insulation foam spray improves energy efficiency and comfort, while the special applicator nozzle ensures clean, precise application for professional results Fire Cement Pipe Thread Sealant Roof Sealant Silicone Sealants Chemical Anchor Marine Sealant Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 91 4.6 out of 5 stars 103 4.6 out of 5 stars 113 4.3 out of 5 stars 259 4.5 out of 5 stars 121 4.4 out of 5 stars 32 Price £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £11.04 £ 11 . 04 £11.04 £ 11 . 04 £7.26 £ 7 . 26 £12.10 £ 12 . 10 £15.36 £ 15 . 36 Usage Details Ready Mixed Fire Cement for Stoves, Burners etc. Sealing Pipe Threads such as Water & Gas Pipes Sealing Roofing Felts & Gutters Squeezeable Silicone Sealant for Bathroom Wood & more Strongly Bonding Brick, Concrete, Stone, Granite & Fixings Bonding on boats, hulls, decks, and other marine structures
